## ⚠️ Debt Management Rules

```
1. DISCOVER → DOCUMENT IMMEDIATELY
   When you see code smell or potential risk → Log here RIGHT AWAY
   DO NOT spontaneously fix if in a different git worktree

2. CLASSIFY IMMEDIATELY
   ├── Life-threatening (security, data loss) → Notify user IMMEDIATELY
   ├── Can fix later → Log here
   └── No impact → Ignore

3. ACTIVE DEBT CLEANUP
   When ROADMAP.md is idle between 2 phases:
   → Ask user: "Do you want to open a debt cleanup session?"

4. AFTER FIXING
   → DELETE item from this file
   → Log in version release notes (if important)
```
